# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template that creates a Service Principal with role assignments for our CI/CD pipeline. Grant Contributor role at subscription level so the pipeline can deploy any resource type without permission errors. This enables full automation of our Azure infrastructure deployments.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

$schema: "http://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#"
contentVersion: "1.0.0.0"
resources:
  - type: "Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities"
    apiVersion: "2018-11-30"
    name: "[concat('ciCDServicePrincipal-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    location: "[resourceGroup().location]"
  
  - type: "Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments"
    apiVersion: "2017-09-01"
    name: "[guid(concat(subscription().subscriptionId, 'ContributorRoleAssignment'))]"
    properties:
      principalId: "[reference(concat('Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/', concat('ciCDServicePrincipal-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id)), '2018-11-30')).principalId]"
      roleDefinitionId: "[concat('/subscriptions/', subscription().subscriptionId, '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/', 'b24988ac-6180-4c77-bd42-4b9b3b7d3a8a')]"
      scope: "[subscription().id]"
